demo.welcome: Welcome to the Wn Inventory App
demo.realtimeOff: Realtime not configured — set centrifugoWsUrl (e.g. ws://localhost:8000/connection/websocket) and run Centrifugo to enable the live feed.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Latest posts from the Journal API

search.title: Search
search.label: Search inventory
search.error: Couldn't search right now. Check your connection and try again.

empty.title: No items match
empty.body: Try a different name or clear your filters.

delete.title: Delete "{name}"?
delete.body: This removes {locations} Locations and {items} Items. This can't be undone.

delete.title: Delete "{name}"?
delete.body: Its {items} Items will move to General. This can't be undone.

firstArea.title: Start your inventory
firstArea.body: Create your first Area to start cataloguing your things.

locations.title: No Locations yet
locations.body: Add a Location to start placing things here.

items.title: No items here yet
items.body: Add an Item to record what lives here.

error.saveFailed: Couldn't save. Check your connection and try again.
error.loadFailed: Couldn't load this. Refresh to try again.
error.notFound: This doesn't exist or isn't available to you.
error.photoRejected: That image couldn't be uploaded. Use JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP under 10 MB.

aiAssist.entryLabel: Use AI to catalog your inventory
aiAssist.title: Catalog with AI
aiAssist.subtitle: Snap a photo of your things and we'll list them for you to review.
aiAssist.photoHint: Take a photo or choose one from your device.
aiAssist.reviewHint: Edit, remove, or add items before saving.
aiAssist.duplicateHint: An item like this may already exist.

empty.title: No items recognized
empty.body: Add items manually or try another photo.

aiAssist.error: Couldn't analyze that photo. Try again or add items manually.
